reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of a sink, vases, a mirror, and low lighting suggest it is more suited to a bathroom or personal care area rather than a workspace. The high ceiling and low sink counter also make it difficult to stand and work comfortably.
